scope: Communication call recording start duplicate-submit behavior after an active recording exists.
expected: A duplicate recording start for the same active session should be rejected with call_recording_already_active and must not start a second LiveKit egress, create a second recording row, create a second recording_started event, or create a second recording-start audit event.
actual: Pass: first recording start returned 201; second start returned 409 call_recording_already_active; fake egress saw exactly one startTrackEgress call; DB readback showed exactly one recording row, one recording_started event, and one communications.call_recording_started audit event.

verification.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/communicationRealtimeRoutes.db.test.ts -t "rejects duplicate recording start"
verification.notes: Vitest emitted the existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts, unrelated to this slice. This covers duplicate-submit after an active recording exists; it does not claim a full first-start concurrent race lock.

verification.observed: Seeded dev tenants, users, org structure, CRM, projects and communications data
verification.notes: Restored local browser/dev seed state after the targeted DB test.

coverageImpact: Adds fresh DB/API evidence for media recording start duplicate-submit suppression and readback. Broader RISK-WRITE-FLOW-RACE-IDEMPOTENCY remains open for concurrent first-start race locks and other write surfaces.
